title: Special Education Pre-Service Teachers' Conscientiousness and Their Attitudes towards Artificial Intelligence: The Mediating Role of AI Literacy and AI Anxiety
author: Halime Miray Sümer-Dodur
description: Complex interactions between personality traits, technology literacy, and anxiety levels influence pre-service special education teachers' attitudes towards artificial intelligence (AI). However, the mechanisms underlying these interactions have not been sufficiently investigated in the literature.
